title: Adopt SpecSync 5.0.1 and Trust 1.0.0 governance for the Rust AlgoChat implementation
description: Adopt SpecSync 5.0.1 and Trust 1.0.0 governance for the Rust AlgoChat implementation
acceptance_criteria: SpecSync strict validation passes at 100% file and LOC coverage with member-level API coverage; five active canonical contracts truthfully describe client, standard protocol, PSK, crate-root, and cross-vector behavior; all four agent integrations report installed; Trust doctor and native verification pass; formatting, clippy, build, all 225 unit tests, and 14 cross-implementation tests pass; release and standalone Atlas workflows remain intact.
